summary: Regression backend health check after Prysm rebrand + slim requirements-prod.txt change. Created /app/backend/tests/test_regression_prysm_rebrand.py with 16 pytest cases hitting the LIVE preview backend (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All 16 passed: health (/api/), admin login (success + invalid pw), token verify (valid + missing), applications list (auth required + 200 with admin token, no _id leak), and accept endpoint validation (auth required, unknown id => 404 not 500, and each of 7 contract_type values accepted without 422/500). Non-destructive: no real applications were mutated.
critical_code_review_comments: applications.py is 873 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider splitting (submit/login/status, verification, accept/unlock, sign-contract/download, admin-list/delete) into sub-modules.

GET /api/applications/ at routes/applications.py:215 only checks 'Bearer ' prefix without validating/decoding the token (relies on it being present). Token signature/expiry is not verified for this admin-only endpoint. Recommend reusing verify_admin_token helper from routes/admin.py here and on /accept, /unlock so a forged/expired token cannot list/mutate applications.

POST /api/applications/{id}/accept silently coerces an invalid contract_type to 'vollzeit' (line 250-251) instead of returning 400/422. This hides client bugs; prefer Pydantic Enum + explicit validation error.
test_credentials: admin@prysm-technologies.com / Kp9!xRv2Lq@Zm7Tn4&Q — works, seeded admin login returns JWT 200.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests are read-only / use non-existent app ids for accept validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live preview backend at https://keyperion-preview.preview.emergentagent.com is healthy post-rebrand. Admin token endpoint shape: POST /api/admin/login returns {access_token, token_type}. GET /api/applications/ (trailing slash) returns list and strips _id and password_hash. Accept endpoint validates 7 contract types (vollzeit, teilzeit, minijob, minijob_at, vollzeit_at, teilzeit_at, freiberufler_at) and falls back to 'vollzeit' for unknown values. Reusable regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_regression_prysm_rebrand.py.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issue found this iteration.
